description: Olympus cross-language conformance test vectors. Generated from the Python reference implementation (protocol/hashes.py, protocol/merkle.py). All hash values are lowercase hex strings.

domain_separation.dual_root_commitment_formula: binding_hash = BLAKE3("OLY:LEDGER:V1" || "|" || len_b3 || blake3_root || "|" || len_pos || poseidon_root_32be); wire = len_b3 || blake3_root || len_pos || poseidon_root_32be || binding_hash; len_b3 and len_pos are 2-byte big-endian length prefixes (always 0x0020 = 32).

blake3_raw.description: BLAKE3 of NFC-normalized Unicode (café résumé naïve)

merkle_leaf_hash.description: Leaf hash of empty bytes — BLAKE3(OLY:LEAF:V1 || '|' || '')

merkle_parent_hash.description: Parent of leaf_hash('alpha') and leaf_hash('beta') — BLAKE3(OLY:NODE:V1 || '|' || left || '|' || right)

merkle_root.description: Root of 3-leaf tree ['alpha', 'beta', 'gamma'] — CT-style promotion applied

merkle_proof.description: Inclusion proof for leaf 0 in 2-leaf tree ['alpha', 'beta']. Must verify as valid.
Inclusion proof for leaf 1 in 3-leaf tree ['alpha', 'beta', 'gamma']. Must verify as valid.
Tampered proof — wrong root hash. Must verify as invalid.
Valid proof for leaf[2] in 7-leaf tree (deep path)

poseidon_root.description: Poseidon Merkle root of 3-byte-string leaves ['doc1', 'doc2', 'doc3']. Leaves are converted via BLAKE3→field element before tree construction.

ledger_entry_hash.description: Genesis entry — no prev_entry_hash, no certificate. Hash = BLAKE3(OLY:LEDGER:V1 || canonical_json_bytes(payload)).
Chained entry — prev_entry_hash set to the genesis entry hash above.
Entry with federation_quorum_certificate — certificate fields are fully canonicalized (only known fields included, quorum_threshold as integer, acknowledgments sorted).

dual_root_commitment.description: Valid: both BLAKE3 and Poseidon roots derived from the same 3-section document
Invalid: BLAKE3 root from document A, Poseidon root from unrelated document B
Edge: single-leaf (minimal) document with valid dual-root commitment
Malformed: corrupted BLAKE3 root does not match recomputed hash from document parts

verification_bundle.description: Self-contained 3-event verification bundle for conformance testing
